title: athyrium × inouei
intro: Athyrium × inouei, also known as the Japanese Lady Fern or Inoue's Lady Fern, is a hybrid species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been traditionally used in Asian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Athyrium × inouei include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, and it can also be used in tinctures or capsules for its medicinal properties.
